name: Outplay Multi-Channel Sales Engagement API
what_it_does: Multi-channel sales engagement platform with REST API — enabling SDR teams to run automated sequences across email, phone, SMS, LinkedIn, Twitter, and WhatsApp, with CRM-native integration, AI-powered email writing, real-time notifications, and meeting booking for outbound sales automation.
use_cases: Managing multi-channel sales sequences (email + phone + LinkedIn) via API
Querying sequence performance metrics and reply analytics for SDR reporting
Adding prospects to outreach sequences from CRM triggers via API
Pulling conversation data and reply categorization for sales pipeline analysis
Integrating Outplay activity data with HubSpot or Salesforce for activity logging
not_for: High-volume cold email with inbox rotation at scale (use Instantly.ai)
Transactional email and product notifications (use Postmark)
Enterprise account-based selling with complex workflows (use Outreach or Salesloft)
best_when: A growing sales development team wants affordable multi-channel outreach (email, phone, LinkedIn, SMS) with CRM integration and AI writing assistance, without the high per-seat cost of enterprise platforms like Outreach or Salesloft.
avoid_when: You need enterprise-grade account-based selling features, complex governance workflows, or very high-volume cold email with advanced deliverability management.

auth.notes: API key from Outplay account settings. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped access. Webhook for email events, meeting bookings, and prospect status changes. No OAuth2. CRM integrations (Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive) via native connectors.

pricing.notes: Indian company (Bengaluru, bootstrapped initially). Founded 2019. Raised $7.3M Seed. Y Combinator W20. Price competitiveness vs Outreach/Salesloft is key differentiator. Multi-channel including WhatsApp unique for international sales. Chat feature built-in. Meeting scheduler integrated. Strong in SMB and mid-market sales teams globally.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for sequences, prospects, analytics, and meetings. Bearer token auth. Good documentation. Multi-channel steps (LinkedIn, WhatsApp) require additional account connections. Webhook for all engagement events. CRM sync configured separately in admin.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Sequence reads idempotent. Prospect reads idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by date range. Prospect addition is append-only — check for duplicate before adding.
known_agent_gotchas: LinkedIn and WhatsApp steps require separate account connections beyond API key
Prospect deduplication — check for existing prospect before API addition
CAN-SPAM and GDPR compliance required for all email sequences
YC-backed but smaller team — verify API support responsiveness
WhatsApp integration requires WhatsApp Business API separately

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR and CAN-SPAM compliant. US and EU data residency. Bearer token auth. Multi-channel outreach requires multiple account credentials — implement secure storage for all platform tokens. Prospect PII requires GDPR-compliant retention. Indian company with US/EU data residency options.
